case_title: KIEFER, JONATHAN VS DITTON, ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY KIEFER, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DITTON, ANTHONY CONNOISSEURS GUIDE PUBLISHING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
